keyFeatures.en: AI-powered resume and LinkedIn profile optimization
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的简历和LinkedIn个人资料优化

keyFeatures.en: Instant feedback on resume strength and keyword matching
keyFeatures.zh: 即时反馈简历强度和关键词匹配

keyFeatures.en: Industry-specific suggestions for improving job application materials
keyFeatures.zh: 针对特定行业的求职材料改进建议

description.en: Basic resume scoring and limited feedback
description.zh: 基本简历评分和有限反馈

monthlyCredits.en: Limited number of scans per month

description.en: Unlimited resume scans, detailed feedback, and LinkedIn optimization
description.zh: 无限次简历扫描、详细反馈和LinkedIn优化

description.en: Custom solutions for teams and organizations with advanced analytics
description.zh: 为团队和组织提供定制解决方案和高级分析

commercialUse.en: Allowed for commercial use within organization
commercialUse.zh: 允许组织内部商业使用

weaknesses.en: Limited free tier with restricted features, may not be sufficient for serious job seekers
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐功能有限，对于认真求职者可能不足

weaknesses.en: Pricing can be high for individuals compared to some competitors
weaknesses.zh: 与一些竞争对手相比，个人用户定价可能较高

weaknesses.en: Relies heavily on AI suggestions which may not always capture nuanced industry requirements
weaknesses.zh: 严重依赖AI建议，可能无法总是捕捉细微的行业要求

targetAudience.en: Job seekers, professionals looking to improve their resumes and LinkedIn profiles, and HR teams seeking to optimize hiring processes
targetAudience.zh: 求职者、希望改进简历和LinkedIn个人资料的专业人士，以及寻求优化招聘流程的HR团队

positioning.en: A specialized AI tool focused on resume and LinkedIn profile optimization to help users land more interviews and job offers
positioning.zh: 专注于简历和LinkedIn个人资料优化的专业AI工具，帮助用户获得更多面试和工作机会

weaknesses.en: Lack of transparent pricing and feature details on the website
weaknesses.zh: 网站上缺乏透明的定价和功能详情

weaknesses.en: No accessible landing or pricing page content to evaluate the product
weaknesses.zh: 无法访问着陆页或定价页面内容以评估产品

keyFeatures.en: AI-powered resume builder with customizable templates
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的简历生成器，提供可自定义模板

keyFeatures.en: Cover letter generator and job application tracking
keyFeatures.zh: 求职信生成器和职位申请跟踪

keyFeatures.en: Professional resume review and optimization suggestions
keyFeatures.zh: 专业简历审查和优化建议

description.en: Basic resume creation with limited templates and AI features
description.zh: 基础简历创建，模板和AI功能有限

weaknesses.en: Limited pricing and feature details available without account creation
weaknesses.zh: 未创建账户时，定价和功能详情有限

weaknesses.en: Potential restrictions on advanced AI features in free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费版可能限制高级AI功能

weaknesses.en: Lack of transparent information on commercial use and file size limits
weaknesses.zh: 商业使用和文件大小限制信息不透明

targetAudience.en: Job seekers, professionals, and students looking to create or improve resumes and cover letters
targetAudience.zh: 求职者、专业人士和学生，希望创建或改进简历和求职信

positioning.en: AI-driven platform for modern resume building and job application enhancement
positioning.zh: AI驱动的现代简历构建和求职申请增强平台

marketGaps.en: Transparent and accessible pricing and feature information without mandatory account creation, addressing users frustrated by hidden costs or unclear product details.
marketGaps.zh: 提供透明且易于获取的定价和功能信息，无需强制创建账户，解决用户对隐藏成本或产品细节不明确的困扰。

marketGaps.en: A robust free tier with sufficient features for serious job seekers, avoiding heavy restrictions that limit usability for non-paying users.
marketGaps.zh: 为认真求职者提供功能充足的免费层级，避免对非付费用户施加过多限制，影响使用体验。

marketGaps.en: Clear guidelines on commercial use, file handling, and AI feature limitations, catering to users needing certainty for professional or business applications.
marketGaps.zh: 明确商业使用、文件处理和AI功能限制的指南，满足用户在专业或商业应用中需要确定性的需求。
